items.title: Thomson Reuters Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Announcement and Webcast Scheduled for August 5, 2026
items.summary: Thomson Reuters (TSX/Nasdaq: TRI) announced today its second-quarter 2026 earnings will be issued via news release on Wednesday, August 5, 2026.
